message:
feat: rename thinking indicator to planning, add configurable extended thinking

- "thinking..." was misleading — renamed to "planning (turn N)..."
  since it's just the LLM call, not extended thinking
- Added `thinking` field to AgentSpec: true for default 10k budget,
  or { budget_tokens: N } for custom budget
- Wired through buildPlanRequest → provider_options.anthropic.thinking
- When thinking is enabled, auto-bumps max_tokens to accommodate budget

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
